included_moves.source_path: meta/** governance/** performance/** excluding meta/identity and meta/stability
included_moves.target_path: tools/repo/ tools/governance/ tools/performance/ contracts/ docs/ archive/

deferred_items: governance, broader meta semantics, and performance surfaces need separate namespace gates
blocked_items: direct apply of active imports without shim/static check policy

shims.retirement_condition: all active imports rewritten and old-import static check passes

rollback: Reverse active-tool moves/import rewrites/references/shims and restore validation/meta exceptions.
apply_strategy: Use MOVE-FAMILY-00C-A as the first subwave; defer governance/performance until wrappers are planned.
